prompt: I don't need a complex framework. Just help me do a quick value vs effort 2x2 for these items: notification preferences, bulk user import, SSO, dark mode, API webhooks, custom dashboard layouts.
assertions: Uses Value vs Effort matrix as requested, not RICE
Items are placed in four quadrants (high-value/low-effort, high-value/high-effort, low-value/low-effort, low-value/high-effort)
Assumptions behind value and effort estimates are visible
The three mandatory challenges are still run after the framework
